overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player approaching a traditional Japanese-style commercial building, entering through sliding doors, and examining interior details including a reception desk with a JINGUJI display box and a wall-mounted futuristic katana. The scene transitions from warm golden hour exterior lighting to dim, atmospheric interior illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese building entrance with stone stairs and lanterns

events.description: entering the building through sliding doors

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs toward the entrance of a traditional wooden building

entered.detail: traditional wooden temple-style architecture with curved roof and extended eaves
wide stone steps leading up to the entrance platform
dark wooden handrails flanking the staircase
illuminated traditional paper lanterns with Japanese characters mounted on posts
large dark sliding doors with metal hardware serving as the main entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view approaching a traditional Japanese building during golden hour. The camera ascends stone stairs flanked by wooden railings and illuminated paper lanterns, approaching the large sliding entrance doors. Warm sunlight casts long shadows across the wooden deck as the player reaches and enters the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance vestibule transitioning to main reception hall

events.description: transition from bright exterior sunlight to dim interior lighting
moving from narrow entrance into open reception room

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit entrance vestibule into the main interior space

entered.detail: narrow entry hallway with wooden walls and shoji screens
traditional paper-paneled wooden screens dividing the space
long dark wooden counter with illuminated displays visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having entered the building, the camera moves through a dimly lit entrance vestibule with wooden walls and shoji screens. The lighting shifts dramatically from warm exterior sun to shadowy interior. As the player progresses deeper, a reception desk becomes visible in the distance, marking the transition into the main commercial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury boutique reception area with display counter

events.description: slowing down to examine objects on the reception desk
camera moves very close to JINGUJI box, filling the frame

agents.ego_description: approaching the reception desk and examining luxury display items including an ornate branded box

entered.detail: ornate oval display case with gold trim and JINGUJI branding containing a metallic object
large decorative stone on illuminated base with blue accent lighting
tall rectangular paper lamps with warm white glow flanking the desk
futuristic blue-lit digital interface on the desk surface
stack of hardcover books on the desk corner

segments.scene_description: The player enters the main reception area featuring a long wooden desk with luxury items on display. The camera slows to examine a prominent JINGUJI-branded oval case, a sculptural rock with blue accent lighting, and modern rectangular lamps. The space blends traditional Japanese aesthetics with futuristic elements like holographic displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: weapon display wall with mounted traditional sword

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on wall-mounted sword
panning right along the wall to view the full length of the blade

agents.ego_description: examining a futuristic katana mounted on the wall, panning slowly along its length

entered.detail: futuristic katana with ornate hilt and spine-like blade design displayed on wooden shelf
dark wooden wall-mounted display shelves with traditional joinery
decorated wooden scabbard with intricate patterns mounted beside the blade

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up from the desk to focus on a wall-mounted display featuring a futuristic katana with an intricate spine-like blade. The player pans slowly along the weapon's length, revealing detailed craftsmanship on the hilt and a decorated wooden scabbard. The warm lighting highlights the contrast between the traditional wooden architecture and the high-tech weapon design.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sun-drenched traditional exterior into a dimly lit, high-tech Japanese interior. It begins by ascending stone stairs flanked by illuminated paper lanterns, moving through the warm golden hour light toward large sliding entrance doors. As the camera crosses the threshold, the scene shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to a shadowy vestibule of wooden walls and shoji screens before opening into a main reception area. The camera then slows to examine luxury items on a long wooden desk, including a JINGUJI-branded oval case and blue-accented sculptural rocks that blend traditional aesthetics with futuristic holograms. Finally, the view tilts upward to pan along a wall-mounted futuristic katana, highlighting the intricate spine-like blade against the backdrop of classic wooden architecture.
